---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for ServerDash
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you would like to see.

## Problem or Use Case

Describe the problem this feature would solve or the use case it would enable. Why is this feature important to you?

## Proposed Solution

If you have an idea for how this could be implemented, describe it here.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? If so, describe them and explain why your proposed solution is preferred.

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, screenshots, or references that help explain the feature request.
